files.patch:
@@ -1296,0 +1296,4 @@
+# Set dependencies for doc tests
+$(eval $(call AddTestDependency, docs_all, docs-jdk))
+test-docs: test-docs_all
+
@@ -1298,1 +1302,1 @@
-    test-jdk-jtreg-native
+    test-jdk-jtreg-native test-docs

@@ -135,0 +135,9 @@
+define AddTestDependency
+  test-$(strip $1): $2
+
+  exploded-test-$(strip $1): $2
+
+  ifneq ($(filter $(TEST), $1), )
+    TEST_DEPS += $2
+  endif
+endef
